question_text: Which of the following would reduce friction between a moving object and a surface?

options.label: B
options.text: Adding oil or lubricant between the surfaces

options.label: C
options.text: Increasing the weight of the object

explanation: Lubricants like oil create a slippery layer between surfaces, reducing the contact between bumps and irregularities, which decreases friction. This is why we oil door hinges and use grease on bicycle chains.
